nodes.label: Tests for verifying end_call_with_reason behavior in different scenarios.  This
Helper class to track end call related state during tests.
Mock end call tool model for testing.
Create a PipecatEngine with tracking for end call behavior.      Args:         w
Test end call behavior when transitioning to an end node.
Test that transitioning to end node mutes pipeline and extracts variables.
Test that multi-node workflow extracts variables from correct nodes.          Sc
Test end call behavior when using custom end_call tool.
Test that end_call tool without custom message ends call immediately.          S
Test that end_call tool with custom message speaks before ending.          Scena
Test end call behavior when client disconnects.
Test that client disconnect triggers end_call_with_reason.          Scenario:
Test race conditions between different end call triggers.
Test that only the first end_call_with_reason call succeeds.          Scenario:
Test race between end_call tool and client disconnect.          Scenario:
Test variable extraction behavior during end call.
Test that end_call_with_reason performs synchronous extraction.          Scenari
Test that extraction is skipped when current node has no extraction.          Sc
